     The Numbers Business Report

Sleepless (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,783,704Details
International Box Office $12,512,955
Worldwide Box Office $33,296,659
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,378,682
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,078,065
Total $4,456,747
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Undercover Las Vegas police officer Vincent Downs is caught in a high stakes web of corrupt cops and the mob-controlled casino underground. When a heist goes wrong, a crew of homicidal gangsters kidnaps Downs’ teenage son. In one sleepless night he will have to rescue his son, evade an internal affairs investigation and bring the kidnappers to justice.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,344,128 (40.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,803 opening theaters/1,803 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $27,711,607

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 13th, 2017 (Wide) by Open Road
International Releases: January 11th, 2017 (Wide) (Trinidad)
January 12th, 2017 (Wide) (Curacao)
January 12th, 2017 (Wide) (Aruba)
January 13th, 2017 (Wide), released as Nos Limites da Lei (Portugal)
January 18th, 2017 (Wide) (Jamaica)
Video Release: April 18th, 2017 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2455 (Cert #50233), 12/14/2016)
Running Time: 95 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Geographical setting: Las Vegas
Plot point: Corrupt Cops, Internal Affairs, Kidnap, Rescue
Social setting: Organized Crime, Police life
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Open Road Films, Riverstone Pictures, Vertigo Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Undercover Las Vegas police officer Vincent Downs is caught in a high stakes web of corrupt cops and the mob-controlled casino underground. When a heist goes wrong, a crew of homicidal gangsters kidnaps Downs’ teenage son. In one sleepless night he will have to rescue his son, evade an internal affairs investigation and bring the kidnappers to justice.
